MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Jack Praetzellis, Esq. of FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP, T:415.364.5540, for defendant/moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT YUANDA USA CORPORATION LTD'S. MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE as follows:

The verified application of Jean Gallo Wine to appear as counsel pro hac vice to defendant Yuanda USA Corporation Ltd. is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Christine Jordan CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org
